hero_sub: I build AI agents and automations that give your team hours back every week. A decade of agency experience. Zero hype.

services.title: Custom AI agents
services.description: Autonomous agents that handle the tasks your team does manually every single day.

services.title: Workflow automation
services.description: Connect your tools. Eliminate the busywork. Let your team focus on what actually matters.

services.title: AI strategy
services.description: I'll find the highest-ROI automation opportunities hiding in your operations.

services.title: Intelligent chatbots
services.description: Customer-facing agents that understand your business — not canned responses.

services.title: Team training
services.description: Hands-on workshops so your people are confident with AI, not intimidated by it.

services.title: Systems audit
services.description: I'll map your entire stack and show you exactly what AI can take off your plate.

about_bio:
I spent a decade building things for agencies — websites, campaigns, digital products. I saw firsthand how much time gets burned on work that should be automated.

Now I build the AI that does that work. No layers of account managers. No hand-offs. Just one experienced builder who picks up the phone, understands your business, and ships working solutions.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We talk about what's eating your team's time. No pitch, no pressure — just questions and listening.

steps.title: Audit and scope
steps.description: I map your workflow, identify the highest-impact automations, and give you a clear plan with real costs.

steps.title: Build and deliver
steps.description: I build it, test it, train your team, and stick around until it's running smoothly.

contact_heading: Let's figure out what AI can do for you
contact_sub: Tell me about your business. I'll respond within 24 hours.
